description_long: This perfume bottle features a striking teardrop-shaped body crafted from a vibrant, marbled blue glass that shimmers with hints of turquoise and subtle purple undertones. The lower portion of the bottle is adorned with ornate, gold-toned metallic accents that wrap around the base and spiral upward in a draped, fabric-like motif. The neck of the bottle is encased in a sculpted, gold metallic collar, adding a sense of luxury and refinement. At the top, a decorative, crown-shaped cap sits prominently, echoing the gold finish and featuring intricate detailing and a rounded finial. The overall design is both elegant and opulent, suggesting a vintage or high-end fragrance presentation. No visible branding or text is present on the bottle, emphasizing its ornamental and collectible qualities.
description: An ornate, teardrop-shaped blue glass perfume bottle with gold metallic accents and a decorative crown-shaped cap. The design is luxurious and vintage-inspired, with intricate sculpted details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the teardrop blue glass body with gold metallic draping and a prominent crown-shaped cap.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, this view highlights the marbled blue glass and the spiral gold accent wrapping the neck.
description_view_2: Another angled view, similar to the front, emphasizing the symmetry and the gold base detailing.
description_view_3: This view displays the blue glass body with a more pronounced turquoise hue and the ornate gold cap from a different angle.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The bottle cap is crown-shaped, medium-sized, and made of gold-toned metal with intricate sculpted details and a rounded finial at the top. It appears to be removable and serves as both a functional and decorative element.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: The silhouette is teardrop-shaped with a rounded base, gently tapering neck, and a prominent, ornate cap. The outline is symmetrical with soft curves and a slightly faceted lower edge.
attribute_decorative_elements: Gold metallic draped spiral around the neck
Ornate crown-shaped cap with sculpted details
Marbled blue glass body with subtle color variations
